meaning: n.罗得西亚(前南非一地区)人adj.罗得西亚的
examples: Ian Smith, a rebellious Rhodesian, died on November 20th, aged 88.
A Rhodesian Ridgeback in Germany also hit the headlines last September when she also gave birth to 17 puppies.
Breeds known to be affected include Rhodesian Ridgeback and Thai Ridgeback, in which it is hereditary, Kerry Blue Terriers, Shih Tzus and Boxers.
It is not easy, or has not been until recently, to create sympathetic figures out of white Rhodesian farmers.
Witnesses have included a former Rhodesian commando, referred to as Mr K, who was recruited to run the South African military's top-secret hit squad.
